prompt: Write a slime enemy script (slime.gd) for Godot 4. The slime should wander randomly when idle, chase the player when it enters a detection zone, deal continuous contact damage, and die with a fade-out effect when HP reaches 0. It needs a simple state machine.

assertions.text: Type hints on ALL function signatures (params + return type)
Uses @export with grouping for tuning variables
Contact damage uses get_overlapping_areas() polling (not just area_entered)
Death tween stored in typed variable (var tween: Tween = create_tween())
Correct code ordering: signals > enums > constants > exports > vars > onready
Uses match for state dispatch in _physics_process
